ab: Na dasun amu haip sinsi munludun ta dadan.
ch: A:老師今天要帶你們去山上走走。
en: I will take you to the mountains today.

ab: Tupa ka tina tu madeia a ludunta qatibing.
ch: B:媽媽說山上有很多蚊子。
en: Mom says that there are lots of mosquitoes in the mountains.

ab: Adasun amu haip sinsi munhan qomata munqoma.
ch: A:老師今天要帶你們去田裡工作。
en: I will take you to the fields.

ab: Na macuqaz cata qoma tu dalaq?
ch: B:我們要去田裡翻土嗎?
en: Are we going to loosen the soil?

ab: Na municaq cata haip?
ch: A:我們今天要去哪裡?
en: Where are we going today?

ab: Adasun cata sinsi munha’an vanglaz mudadan.
ch: B:老師要帶我們去河邊走走。
en: Teacher will take us to the riverside.

ab: Na municaq cata haip?
ch: A:我們今天要去哪裡?
en: Where are we going today?

ab: Na dasun cata sinsi munludun ta kilim mi qodu.
ch: B:老師要帶我們去山上找龍葵菜。
en: Teacher will take us to the mountains today.

ab: Munha’an cata haip dau vanglaz ta?
ch: A:我們今天要去河邊嗎?
en: Are we going to the riverside today?

ab: Ni, adasun ata sinsi munludun ta.
ch: B:不是，老師要帶我們去山上。
en: No, our teacher is going to take us to the mountains.

ab: Munludun cata haip?
ch: A:我們今天要去山上嗎?
en: Are we going to the mountains today?

ab: Ni, munha’an ata qoma haip.
ch: B:不是，我們今天要去田裡。
en: No, we are going to the fields.

ab: Masnanava, ma’aq mita sadu’an ha’an vanglazta cunah?
ch: A:老師，我們到河邊要看什麼?
en: Teacher, what are we going to see at the riverside?

ab: Sadu ata ki qalindis.
ch: B:我們去看蜻蜓。
en: We are going to see dragonflies.

ab: Masnanava, ma’aq mita sadu’an ha’an ludunta cunah?
ch: A:老師，我們到山上要看什麼?
en: Teacher, what are we going to see in the mountains?

ab: Sadu ata ki talikuan.
ch: B:我們去看蝴蝶。
en: We are going to see butterflies.

ab: Malqa’mq cata munha’an qomata tu?
ch: A:我們到田裡要做什麼?
en: What are we going to do in the fields?

ab: Munha’an ata qoma sadu ki imta sincuaz tu tipul, asatu malnanulu na heza a qalua cin vanu qai!
ch: B:我們要到田裡看我們種的玉米，要小心有螞蟻、蜜蜂唷!
en: We are going to see the corn we grow in the fields, but you need to be aware of the ants and bees.

ab: Masnanava, munha’an cata vanglazta lingqaul nobah?
ch: A:老師，我們要到河邊游泳嗎?
en: Teacher, are we going to swim in the river?

ab: Ni, na madamu ata ki iskan.
ch: B:不是，我們要去抓魚。
en: No, we are going to see dragonflies.

ab: Sinsi, munha’an cata qomata macuaz zi sanglav?
ch: A:老師，我們要到田裡種菜嗎?
en: Teacher, are we going to grow some vegetables in the fields?

ab: Na maqun ata ismut haip.
ch: B:我們今天要去砍草。
en: We are going to loosen the soil today.

ab: Heza ita qalindis kusbabai.
ch: A:那裡有蜻蜓飛來飛去。
en: There are dragonflies flying around.

ab: Lopan cak haip sadu ki mamantuk miqomic tu qalindis.
ch: B:我今天才看過真正活著的蜻蜓。
en: Today is the first time I see real living dragonflies.

ab: Sadui, heza ita talikuan kusbabai.
ch: A:看，那裡有蝴蝶飛來飛去。
en: There are butterflies flying around.

ab: Uu! Ua! Madu cak ki talikuan opa i manoaz sadu’an.
ch: B:耶! 哇!  我喜歡蝴蝶因為看起來很漂亮。
en: Yeh! Wow! I love butterflies. They are very beautiful.

ab: Heza ita talikuan kusbabai.
ch: A:那裡有蝴蝶飛來飛去。
en: There are butterflies flying around.

ab: Ni naipa talikuan, vanu naipa.
ch: B:那不是蝴蝶，那是蜜蜂。
en: Those are not butterflies. They are bees.

ab: Muaz qai i’idi sadu ka, nitu munun daqavican ta!
ch: A:在這裡看一看，不要到太遠的地方唷!
en: Come here and take a look. Don’t go too far!

ab: U, na ni cam mundaqavican ta mudadan.
ch: B:好，我們不會去太遠的地方。
en: Got it, we won’t go anywhere too far.

ab: Qa’a tu tindangkul, qanakduk ka mudadan deqe mutingkul.
ch: A:不要用跑的，慢慢走免得跌倒了。
en: Don’t run and walk slowly lest you fall down.

ab: Asa cak kavava sadu ki talikuan.
ch: B:我想趕快看到蝴蝶。
en: I want to see them right away.
